nodes.title: This activity helps you create a manifesto that aligns AI deployment with your organization's mission, manages risks, and builds team trust through responsible AI practices.
Explore the possibilities and pitfalls of AI, and brainstorm how you want to use it.
Learn about AI and how a well-crafted manifesto can power up your team.
Consider how your organization will best utilize AI. Then, create and iterate your manifesto.
Create an elevator pitch and then export your manifesto. Done!
When everyone has added their thoughts to the board, continue to the Rapid Learn activity.
Why you need an AI manifesto
Free advice on integrating AI into your organisation
AI Policies Versus Manifestos Podcast - What's Your AI Manifesto? - AI Moment Podcast
You Need an AI Manifesto - Jeremy Utley
Vention AI Manifesto: Building Ethical, Human-Centered AI
The Responsible AI Manifesto for Marketing and Business
This video is AI-generated using the sources linked above. 👆

Manifesto Template

Vision and Ambition: A forward-looking perspective on the opportunities and potential benefits of AI, inspiring a purposeful approach. [2, 4] (Should be expressed as prose, not a list)

Ethical Principles: Clearly stated principles on data privacy, bias mitigation, transparency, and human-centered AI. [4, 7, 10] (Should be expressed as a bulleted list)

Intended Use Cases: How AI will be applied in internal operations, product/service delivery, and customer experiences. [5] (Should be expressed as a bulleted list)

Cultural Norms: Guidelines for employee interaction with AI, including disclosure requirements and expectations for innovation. [5] (Should be expressed as prose, not a list)

Governance and Accountability: Who is responsible for AI systems and how their development and deployment will be overseen. [5] (Should be expressed as prose, not a list)
Evaluate and refine your manifesto to make sure it's air tight.

A critical client deliverable is due tomorrow and your designated human reviewers are unavailable due to illness. A manager suggests letting the AI auto-publish the work since "it's usually accurate anyway" and missing the deadline could cost the contract. Does your manifesto provide clear guidance on who has authority to override human-in-the-loop requirements during emergencies, and what constitutes a genuine exception versus convenience?

Your procurement process has delayed access to compliant tools for months while competitors gain significant advantages using faster, unapproved alternatives. Team members are frustrated that your ethical AI stance is hindering their ability to do their work effectively, and leadership questions whether your tool selection criteria are actually serving the team's needs. How does your manifesto balance responsible tool selection with practical work requirements, and who decides when perfect compliance prevents necessary progress?

AI's efficiency has exceeded expectations and leadership now wants to reduce staff hours significantly. Team members feel betrayed that your "AI as enhancement" vision has become "AI as replacement," and morale is plummeting as people worry about job security. According to your manifesto, who is responsible for managing this unintended impact?

Your AI-powered hiring assistant is discovered to be systematically underrating candidates from certain demographic groups despite passing initial fairness testing. Legal recommends immediately shutting down the system, but doing so would halt all hiring during your busiest recruitment season and force manual review of thousands of applications. Does your manifesto provide clear guidance on what threshold of bias requires immediate action versus gradual correction?
Create an elevator pitch and then export your manifesto. Done!
This activity helps you create a manifesto that aligns AI deployment with your organization's mission, manages risks, and builds team trust through responsible AI practices.
To optimize the experience, choose a member of your team to fill the following roles:
1 person to share their screen to play the video
1 person to copy and paste content
Why is AI adoption important for your team and the work you do?
What role should AI play in how you do your work?
What does ethical and responsible AI use look like for your team?
What parts of your work should be AI-enabled, and which should be done by humans? How will this be decided?
What AI tools will your team have access to?
Who will you go to if there are questions or concerns about AI use?
Who is creating this manifesto? (capture at the role-level)
Who will be informed about this manifesto? (capture at the role-level)
ACCESS THE MIRO SIDEKICK BY CLICKING THE PURPLE STAR ICON PICTURED HERE. THEN SELECT THE "AI MANIFESTO TESTER" SIDEKICK.
AS A TEAM, REVIEW THE STICKY NOTES. MOVE ANY YOU WANT TO INCORPORATE INTO THE FRAME BELOW AND THEN CLICK RUN TO THE LEFT.

SELECT YOUR MANIFESTO DOCUMENT AND PROMPT THE SIDEKICK TO EVALUATE IT AGAINST ONE OF THE SCENARIOS AVAILABLE IN THE "I CAN HELP" SECTION.


THE TESTER PROVIDES FEEDBACK ON STICKY NOTES ON THE MIRO BOARD. WE RECOMMEND COPYING AND PASTING THEM CLOSER TO THIS WORKSPACE.
